CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Continued To Mar-30-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-10-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Brandon L. Teller, a/k/a Brandon Teller.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:14 a.m.

Rachael Parent, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Umpqua Bank, an Oregon State-Charted Bank.
Robert Sicilia, Assistant Vice President for Consumer Special Assets and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Ms. Parent and Mr. Sicilia appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Brandon L. Teller, a/k/a Brandon Teller.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Consumer Loan Agreement, Money Lent and Account Stated was filed on March 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant Brandon L. Teller, a/k/a Brandon Teller, on May 26, 2021.
Default as to defendant Brandon L. Teller, a/k/a Brandon Teller, was entered on July 7, 2021.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 9, 2021.
December 17,2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Umpqua Bank, an Oregon State-Chartered Bank, and against the defaulted defendant Brandon L. Teller, a/k/a Brandon Teller, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $31,525.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,460.14.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $560.00.

Total - $38,370.42.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 10:23 a.m.

Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
